    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<ToolDefinition>
    GoogleGenAiToolCallingManager.resolveToolDefinitions(ToolCallingChatOptions chatOptions)
    Resolves tool definitions and converts their input schemas to be compatible with Vertex AI's OpenAPI format.
